attributes-to-ignore-regex.name: attributes-to-ignore-regex
attributes-to-ignore-regex.displayName: Attributes to Ignore by Regular Expression

attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex
attributes-to-log-regex.displayName: Attributes to Log by Regular Expression

properties.Surgery Treatment:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("SurgeryTreatment1_OffsetFromDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS OffsetFromDiagnosis,
		'Month' AS OffsetUnitOriginal,
		"SurgeryTreatment1_OffsetUnit__code" AS OffsetUnitEUCAIM,
		"SurgeryTreatment1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS ProcedureIdentifier
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	'AUTH_thyroid' AS datasetId,
		'Sex' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Sex" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Patient:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Sex" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex__code" AS BirthSexEucaim
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Episode:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Episode1_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	'AUTH_thyroid' AS datasetId,
		'Imaging procedure protocol' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Imaging procedure protocol" AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept__code" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Topography : Organ" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode__code" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS ConfirmedByProcedure,
		"Pathology" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode__code" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite:
SELECT 	'AUTH_thyroid' AS datasetId,
		'Topography : Organ' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography : Organ" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	'AUTH_thyroid' AS datasetId,
		'Pathology' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Pathology" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
        "ImagingProcedure1_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate,
		"Imaging procedure protocol" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode__code" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
